# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New provider adapter
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes (Biome format + lint)
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] Integration tests run if DB/router/rate-limit/admin code changed (`bun run --filter @boelabs/unified-gateway test:integration`)
- [ ] Code, comments, and docs are in English
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated documentation (`README.md` / `docs/`) if behavior or the public contract changed
- [ ] No secrets, real API keys, or production connection strings are included

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, trade-offs, follow-ups. -->
